picks.quote: Ezra's about to go eight and 0 tonight. Find a tough kid who's eight and 0. We're just trying to get Ezra a win.
This kid is an absolute stud, and I really really truly think this kid's going to go far in MMA.
he is going to be a problem... the kid's a monster on the ground. If he grabs a hold of YOU IT'S OVER.
